title: Screenie
description: Simply supporting those wanting high resolution screenshots
body:
# Screenie

A Minecraft mod for taking high-resolution screenshots with custom dimensions and settings.

## Features

- Take screenshots at custom resolutions
- Dynamic window size tracking
- GUI configuration screen
- Multiple file formats (PNG, JPG, TGA, BMP)
- HUD hiding option
- Configurable capture delay
- Custom filename templates

## Usage

Press J (default key) to open the configuration screen. Configure your settings and press Apply Changes to save.

![Configuration Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3240e47ccbb33a222e59ba30912167ac59d68f2_0.webp)

### Taking Screenshots

With the mod configured, use the screenshot key to capture images at your specified resolution.

![Screenshot Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b19de18318392b320a567a1fb888ed1b33c77181.png)

## Configuration

The mod creates a configuration file at `.minecraft/config/screenie.properties` with the following options:

- `screenshot_name` - Filename template (supports %time% and %world% variables)
- `replace_default` - Replace default screenshot functionality
- `hide_ui` - Hide HUD during capture
- `save_enabled` - Enable file saving
- `dynamic_sizing` - Automatically track window size changes
- `img_width` - Screenshot width
- `img_height` - Screenshot height
- `countdown` - Frames to wait before capture
- `format` - Output format (PNG, JPG, TGA, BMP)
